Name: PREAMBLE
Name and territory of the Union.
ArtDesc: India, that is Bharat, shall be a Union of States. The States and the territories thereof shall be as specified in the First Schedule.

Name: Equality before law.
ArtDesc: The State shall not deny to any person equality before the law or the equal protection of the laws within the territory of India.

Name: Protection of certain rights regarding freedom of speech, etc.
ArtDesc: All citizens shall have the right to freedom of speech and expression; to assemble peaceably and without arms; to form associations or unions or co-operative societies; to move freely throughout the territory of India; to reside and settle in any part of the territory of India; and to practise any profession, or to carry on any occupation, trade or business.

Name: Protection of life and personal liberty.
ArtDesc: No person shall be deprived of his life or personal liberty except according to procedure established by law.

Name: Protection of interests of minorities.
ArtDesc: Any section of the citizens residing in the territory of India or any part thereof having a distinct language, script or culture of its own shall have the right to conserve the same. No citizen shall be denied admission into any educational institution maintained by the State or receiving aid out of State funds on grounds only of religion, race, caste, language or any of them.

Name: Remedies for enforcement of rights conferred by this Part.
ArtDesc: The right to move the Supreme Court by appropriate proceedings for the enforcement of the rights conferred by this Part is guaranteed. The Supreme Court shall have power to issue directions or orders or writs, including writs in the nature of habeas corpus, mandamus, prohibition, quo warranto and certiorari.
